data.title: Alta Equipment Group Announces Preferred Stock Dividend
data.description: Alta Equipment Group Inc., a prominent provider of material handling, construction, and environmental processing equipment, disclosed that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a quarterly dividend for its Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. The approved dividend amounts to $625 per preferred share, translating to $0.625 for each Depositary Share outstanding, equivalent to a 1/1000th fraction of a Series A Preferred share. Shareholders recorded as of April 15, 2026, will receive the dividend on April 30, 2026.

data.title: BioCryst Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has disclosed that its compensation committee granted 12 recent hires stock options to buy a total of 33,950 shares and restricted stock units (RSUs) for 123,350 shares of BioCryst common stock. These options and RSUs were awarded on April 1, 2026, as significant incentives for these employees joining BioCryst. The grants align with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Multi-Sensor Data Labeling and AI Data Operations: What Enterprise AV Teams
data.description: The safety and readiness of autonomous vehicles rely on the accuracy of LiDAR, radar, and camera annotation rather than the model architecture. These annotations ensure that the AI system can accurately interpret its surroundings. In recent studies, it was found that up to 80% of the development time for autonomous vehicles is spent on annotating data from these sensors. This meticulous annotation process is essential for training AI models effectively. Researchers suggest that the focus should shift towards improving annotation quality to enhance the safety and production viability of autonomous vehicles.

data.title: Plug Power CEO Jose Luis Crespo to Host Reddit AMA on April 16
data.description: Join us for a live Q&A session focusing on our company's strategy, market position, and the future of hydrogen. Get insights into our plans and vision going forward. data.title: Village Farms Announces Succession Plan for Chief Financial Officer
data.description: After serving as CFO for 17 years, Stephen Ruffini is set to move on to oversee M&A activities.

data.title: Wix reveals outcomes of modified Dutch auction tender offer.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest in the past decade. This decline in unemployment represents significant progress as the number of unemployed individuals decreased by 250,000 in the last quarter. Additionally, the economy has experienced a growth rate of 3.5% in the same period. These positive indicators point towards a robust economic recovery and job market in the current scenario. It is worth noting that the job market has been particularly favorable for young professionals, with a 6% increase in employment opportunities for individuals between the ages of 18-25. Experts anticipate this trend to continue in the upcoming months, contributing to a more stable and prosperous economic outlook.

data.title: Lindsay Corporation Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN), a prominent worldwide producer and supplier of irrigation and infrastructure equipment and technology, has reported that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.37 for each share. The dividend is planned to be distributed on May 29, 2026, to shareholders recorded by the end of business on May 15, 2026. Lindsay Corporation had around 10.4 million shares outstanding as of April 1, 2026. These shares are listed and traded on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Wind Turbine Composites Market worth $28.85 billion by 2030 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: A report by MarketsandMarkets stated that the Wind Turbine Composites Market, as of April 3, 2026, is influenced by factors such as fiber type (including glass and carbon), resin type (such as epoxy and polyurethane), manufacturing processes, components (like blades and nacelles), applications (both onshore and offshore), and regions worldwide. This market analysis covers a variety of important elements shaping the wind turbine composites sector.

data.title: Drift Protocol sends onchain message to $280M exploit wallets, unknown sender pressures attacker.
data.description: The Drift Protocol has taken action by contacting wallets linked to the $280 million exploit on-chain. Additionally, an unidentified sender has also tried to persuade the attacker involved in the incident.
